items.prompt: You should report cutsize (or hyperedge cut) and balance/capacity along with the objective.
items.explain: Quality without balance is often illegal or useless.

choices: Complete correct algorithm on scoped tiny/medium instances
items.explain: Complete and correct at learning scale.

items.prompt: Track A asks you to implement greedy pair merge (heaviest-edge matching coarsening) end-to-end, not only click a demo.
items.explain: Implement track is the fidelity path.
